title: Crunchy
description:
Male | Senior | FCV+ and Stomatitis
Crunchy came to us in December 2023. He is currently our longest staying cat at the shelter. Crunchy is very old and therefore has very little energy. He is very mellow but also super sweet. He would be a perfect lap cat. 
Due to his FCV and stomatitis, he is on prednisone everyday. The meds make him thirsty and he drinks a ton of water.
Seniors are $25 to adopt or ask about our Senior for Senior program!

title: Sam
description:
Female | Born 2022
Sam came to us in February of 2024 from another rescue. She is one of our longest-stay residents! We moved her to the office so she can enjoy a quieter life while she waits for her forever home! She would LOVE to make herself at home with you and would thrive in a quieter home.

title: Cosco
description:
Female | Undetermined age (~3 years) | FHV+
Cosco was brought in as a stray in early 2024. She was pregnant and eventually gave birth at the shelter. All of her kittens were adopted but unfortunately she is still here. She is one of our longest stays currently at the shelter. She is a total sweetheart and loves human interaction. 
She is FHV+ and would need to be an only cat. FHV isn’t as daunting as it sounds. There is no medication for FHV therefore her vet bills would be the same as any other cat! 
Cosco has a cloudy eye and it’s from a scratch that healed. There’s no issue with it!

title: Weeble and Wobble
description:
Female & Male | Born 6.27.24 | Bonded siblings
Cerebellar Hypoplasia (Wobbly Cat Syndrome)
Wobble is the male. 
Weeble is the female. 
Weeble and Wobble were born here at the shelter with 2 other littermates. All 4 of them were born with cerebellar hypoplasia. This means their mother had distemper or was given the distemper vaccine and therefore the kittens’ cerebellums didn’t fully develop. They both wobble all the time but it doesn’t cause them any pain. They would need a home with no stairs and mainly carpet. They don’t seem to like other cats. They aren’t upset by the presence of dogs but wouldn’t handle big dogs well because of their wobbles.

Both like to be picked up and walked around to explore new areas in the shelter. They are sweet and get excited to see their favorite people (Grandma Jean!).

title: Sophie
description:
Female | Undetermined age (~2-5 years) | FIV+
Sophie came in as a stray in January 2025. She is the perfect mix of sweet and sassy. She loves pets but will let you know when she wants her space. She also does not like other cats. She is FIV+ so she would need to be an only cat anyways. She has not shown any physical symptoms/health issues from the FIV. It was only discovered through routine testing.

title: Domino
description:
Male | Born late 2024/early 2025
The WHHS took in Domino from the reservation in April 2025. Since he came in, he’s been very reserved and keeps to himself. But 2026 might be his year - he’s started to come out of his shell and make his presence known! He’ll gladly take pets and would do better in a calmer home without many animals or kids. He’ll accept pets and when he’s decided he’s finished, he’ll either walk away but sometimes gets salty with a swat, but hey, he’s a cat…

title: Twilight
description:
Female | <1 year
Twilight was born at the shelter on May 1, 2025. She is the last of her 4 siblings still at the shelter. She is a very relaxed and gentle girl but is getting more and more outgoing (coming up to greet visitors) every day. She is in the cattery and likes to snuggle with the other cats. She’ll gladly take any pets that come her way.

title: Bubbles
description:
Female | Born April 29, 2025
Bubbles was surrendered to us a little baby kitten in May of 2025. She’s grown up with us and although she can be shy at first, she sure does love being pet! We think Bubbles would do well with any family, as long as everyone is patient with her. She may get overwhelmed by small children but we think she’ll gain confidence and have a ton of fun!

title: Winston
description:
Male | Undetermined age (~3 years)
Winston came in as a stray in May 2025. He is a very laid back cat and likes to snuggle up in a bed. He is currently in a walk in with some young cats and does well. He would do best with younger/smaller cats. Winston definitely prefers a more laid back lifestyle.

title: Ellie
description:
Female | Undetermined age (~3 years)
Ellie came in as a stray in June 2025. Since then she has really opened up. She is quite curious and likes to explore. Ellie loves getting attention and pets as well.

title: Cobweb
description:
Female | <1 year
Cobweb was brought in as a stray in August 2025. She used to be shy but is now a big fan of attention and looks like a beautiful panther! She likes to snuggle up with her kennel mates and occasionally will play with some toys. Give her some pets - she’ll love it.

title: Tabby
description:
Female | ~1-2 years
Tabby came to us as a stray in August 2025. She has become more social and affectionate recently and we are so happy to see her happy! But, she would sure be happier in a loving home and out of the kennel. We hope you come and fall in love with this gorgeous gal!

title: Starry
description:
Male | ~1 year
Starry was brought in as a stray in August 2025. He is in a walk in with other kitty friends. He is very playful and loves toys and scratchers. He can be a little shy at first, but once he knows you want to pet him, he’s a happy boy! He’s becoming vocal for more attention and loves to give his kennel pals massages - it’s ADORABLE.

title: Uri
description:
Female | Born 2023
Uri was surrendered to us in August 2025. Unfortunately, her owners could no longer care for her and her sibling cats. Despite her story, Uri is an extremely sweet cat. She loves pets and is very snuggly.

title: Finn
description:
Male | Undetermined age (~2 years)
Finn came in as a stray in October 2025. Since his first day here, he has been extremely sweet. He is in our cattery with other cats and does well. You’ll often find him snuggled up in a bed but will get up to come greet you.

title: Faith
description:
Female | ~3 years

Faith was one of the 5 cats that came from the hoarding situation on November 20th. She was extremely scared and would hide for the first couple weeks she was here. Now, Faith has become quite the love bug. She will put her paws up on your shoulders and nuzzle her head onto you. When in her presence, she is constantly purring and making biscuits. She would probably do best as an only pet as it takes her a while to warm up to other animals and she tends to lash out.

title: Ezra
description:
Male | 17+ years
Ezra was one of the 5 cats that came from the hoarding situation on November 20th. He’s a very old cat but still has quite the energy in him! He will eat anything you give him and will constantly want more. He’s a skinny boy so we have no problem feeding him extra! He likes to walk around to explore and enjoy some pets. He does have a bit of a wobbly walk but the vet says it is nothing to be concerned with. He does appear to be deaf, or going deaf but his eyes are working just fine. Ezra would not do well in a home with younger kids or big dogs and certain stairs would be a struggle for him. An older chill dog would work out fine, we think. 
Seniors are $25 to adopt or ask about our Senior for Senior program!

title: Grace
description:
Female | 14+ years
Grace was one of the 5 cats that came from the hoarding situation on November 20th. She was also severely matted and had to be shaved. Her hair has been growing back nicely! She gets a bit startled by noises and hides but quickly realizes she’s safe and comes back out. She loves to snuggle up on some blankets and enjoys head rubs. Grace does not like other cats and would do best as the only pet in a quiet home. 
Grace likely has a tumor so we’d like to find her a foster for her final months.

title: Pretty Mama
description:
Female | ~2 years 
Pretty Mama came to us in Feb. 2026 after living as a stray on the streets the last year. She had kittens as a stray and she got her name from being pretty & a mama! She’s sweet and becoming more independent in the cattery. She’s a Torbie (tortoiseshell tabby) - very unique!

title: Cleo Catra
description:
Female | Born April 2022
Accepting applications! 
FYI - Currently on antibiotics for ear infection. Follow up appt scheduled 5.22.26
No other animals | Indoor only
Cleo Catra came to us on 3.27.26. She is a sweet girl that adores pets and is just a little unsure in her new environment. Cleo does not like other animals and will pee on things if other animals are present in the home. She does not like big groups so would do best in a quiet home with fewer people. She might not do well with younger children. She is affectionate to her human and it was a hard surrender for her former owner. Orange females are rare and she’s a total catch.

title: Esmeralda
description:
Female | Born 9/10/2015
No kids, preferably no other pets
Esmeralda and her grey Tortie sister, Eleanor, were brought to us on April 4th, 2026. Their parents were expecting a baby and these cats are not fans of children (many attempts were made to get to know kiddos in the family) so they came to us. Esmeralda does lick when she’s stressed so she has some bald patches or spots with thin hair - she’s still a beauty though! Esmeralda would love to join an adult or two in a quiet home. The sisters don’t get along that well and if adopted together, would likely keep their distance in their new home. 
Esmeralda will come with her automatic feeder when adopted.
Seniors are $25 to adopt or ask about our Senior for Senior program!

title: Eleanor
description:
Female | Born 9/10/2015
No kids, no other pets
Eleanor and her Tortie sister, Esmeralda, were brought to us on April 4th, 2026. Their parents were expecting a baby and these cats are not fans of children (many attempts were made to get to know kiddos in the family) so they came to us. Eleanor is a little spicy and would do best in a quiet home with only a few adults that respected her space - she’ll come to you when she wants affection. The sisters don’t get along that well and if adopted together, would likely keep their distance in their new home. 
Eleanor will come with her automatic feeder when adopted. 
Seniors are $25 to adopt or ask about our Senior for Senior program!

title: Simba
description:
Male | 3 years
No dogs
Simba is back with us at no fault of his own. He’s a bit nervous being back and is trying to find his groove. He would love to find a home where he can play and lounge with his humans (he does well with all ages) as he is a total lover and loves to be with his people. He is currently in our cattery, where he resided before. Simba is not a fan of dogs.

title: Guinness
description:
Male | Born ~3.12.26
Guinness came to us on 3.13.26 with siblings and feral mom, Paddy. He’s a cute little fluff and has a twin sister!

title: Charm
description:
Female | Born ~3.12.26
Charm came to us on 3.13.26 with siblings and feral mom, Paddy. She is vocal, loves to climb up your legs, and is the most mischievous of her siblings.

title: Jig
description:
Male | Born ~3.12.26
Jig came to us on 3.13.26 with siblings and feral mom, Paddy. He’s a playful little fluff.

title: Shamrock
description:
Male | Born ~3.12.26
Shamrock came to us on 3.13.26 with siblings and feral mom, Paddy. He’s a little more laid back but is getting more and more rambunctious and talkative!

title: Prego
description:
Female | Undetermined age (~5 years)
No dogs, preferably no cats
Rabies shot scheduled 5.13.26
Hailey’s favorite kitty! Prego came to us as a pregnant stray in January 2026. She gave birth to 4 healthy babies and they have all been adopted. Like her, they were all named after sauces! Prego is an extremely affectionate cat with a bobtail that enjoys watching out the window, growling at anything out of the ordinary - she’d make a great guard dog! Prego loves to be pet, enjoys lounging around, and is always eager to say “hello!” She is currently in the cattery in her own kennel, where she has more room to roam and to be around other cats and we are curious if she’ll warm up to other kitties now that she doesn’t have kittens.

title: Earl Grey
description:
Male | ~1 year old
Available after neuter 5.13.26 - accepting applications!
Earl Grey came to us as a stray on 4.29.26. He’s a handsome and sweet guy that deserves to be pampered like the king he is! He’s gentle, affectionate, and curious. We are unsure how he does with other cats or dogs, but he seems oddly relaxed for shelter life so some bustle and furry friends at a new home might not be a bother to Earl.

title: Eggo
description:
Male | Undetermined age (~3 years)
Available after neuter 5.13.26 - accepting applications!
Eggo came to us as a stray on 4.29.26. He’s a big gentle boy that appears to have once had a home because he’s not feral like we first thought - he’s just scared. He was definitely in some fights in his day and has some scars. He did mess up his nose in the trap before coming in that should heal over and we will post a new photo when it does. There may have been a human that was unkind to him, so he needs a quiet home where he can feel safe and come out of his shell. We are not sure how he does with other cats or dogs.

title: Tweet
description:
Female | ~1-2 years 
Available after spay 5.13.26 - accepting applications!
No dogs
Tweet and her 4 kittens were left at a gas station here in Spearfish. A kind woman worked with Animal Control to bring them to us on 5.1.26. Tweet is talkative and stir crazy here and she is SO very affectionate - so affectionate that we can’t get a good photo of her as she’s too busy rubbing on the camera! We are excited for her to find her new home.

title: Wren
description:
Male | Born ~3.1.26
Wren, his siblings, and their mom were left at a gas station here in Spearfish. A kind woman worked with Animal Control to bring them to us 5.1.26. All 4 kittens are sweet, playful, and love napping. Wren loves a cuddle pile and is looking forward to his new home and humans to love him for his whole life. We are still getting to know each kitten’s personality!

title: Finch
description:
Male | Born ~3.1.26
ON HOLD (5/7 - 5/9)
Finch, his siblings, and their mom were left at a gas station here in Spearfish. A kind woman worked with Animal Control to bring them to us 5.1.26. All 4 kittens are sweet, playful, and love napping. Finch stands out the most with his dark stripes and is looking forward to his new home and humans to love him for his whole life. We are still getting to know each kitten’s personality!

title: Lark
description:
Male | Born ~3.1.26
Lark, his siblings, and their mom were left at a gas station here in Spearfish. A kind woman worked with Animal Control to bring them to us 5.1.26. All 4 kittens are sweet, playful, and love napping. Lark loves to cuddle, observe and loves to wrestle the broom! He is looking forward to his new home and humans to love him for his whole life. We are still getting to know each kitten’s personality!

title: BeeBee
description:
Female | Born ~3.1.26
Beebee, her siblings, and their mom were left at a gas station here in Spearfish. A kind woman worked with Animal Control to bring them to us 5.1.26. All 4 kittens are sweet, playful, and love napping. Beebee is the only female and the most independent. She enjoys making biscuits and she and is looking forward to her new home and humans to love her for her whole life. We are still getting to know her!

title: Paddy
description:
Female | ~2 years old 
Available after spay appt 5.13.26 
BARN/SHOP CAT ONLY (feral)

title: Mr. Black
description:
Male | Undetermined age
Available after neuter appt 5.13.26 
BARN/SHOP CAT ONLY (feral)

title: Nova
description:
Female | Australian Shepherd Mix | 6 yrs
No young children, No cats
Nova is back from her foster adventure! We learned that she really will do best with only one human in the house and being the only pet. She still needs slow introductions even when in her new home. She had great manners without accidents in her foster home and was not destructive so she would not need to be kenneled when left home alone. Please ask questions and we’d be happy to get you in touch with her former foster dad if you want to get to know her more! 
Our longest term resident! Nova was brought in with a male dog and a puppy in 2022, though she remains. Being in the shelter for so long has made her reactive and sassy, therefore she requires a slow introduction. For most new introductions we muzzle her to keep everyone safe. Once she is comfortable with you, she is very affectionate. We call her “Our Princess.” 
She does not get along with female dogs but has shown little to no aggression towards male dogs. Give her some time, you’ll love her as much as we do! 
Nova weighs around 30 pounds.

title: Peyton
description:
Male | Lab/St. Bernard/German Shepherd | 7 yrs
Careful with children, Some Dogs 
Peyton came to us at the end of December 2025. He’s a big, bouncy boy! He’s got the most handsome bark and would do nearly anything for food or treats! He’s very excitable but is following commands. Peyton loves chewable treats, bones, and snuggles. He’s a drooly man who will cover you and his favorite things in slobber! This sweet boy came to us underweight, but we’ve gotten him near his ideal weight now!
Ideal weight will be 90+ pounds; currently 84 pounds.

title: Chase
description:
Male | Pitbull Mix | 1 year
Some dogs, Careful with children
This cute little man came to us for Christmas! Based on his behavior, we’re quite sure he was born and raised in a kennel setting, therefore, he does well in a kennel. He could use some more work on potty training and we’re working on commands. He is quite loud and a little protective of his space, so slow introductions are best. It may take a couple of interactions to win him over, but once you do, he won’t get out of your lap!
For a pup, he’s a hefty 50 pounds!

title: Greg
description:
Male | Mixed Breed | 1-2 years old
Greg came to us on 4/6/26 after his owner left him with someone and never returned… Greg doesn’t let that get him down though! He’s a very nice boy that could work on his manners but has a great attitude and loves his water. He enjoys car rides too! Greg weighs 81 lbs.

title: Lilac
description:
Female | Coohound Mix | Born 8/5/2022
No kids or large/high-energy dogs
This lady came to us on April 7th, 2026. She is a good girl that is just a bit particular - she’s not a big fan of men or high-energy dogs. We hope to get her more comfortable with men while she is with us. Lilac has been to doggy daycare in Rapid at Meadowridge Pet Lodge. She has separation anxiety and can be a bit destructive when left home alone. She does well with cats and smaller, calm dogs. She is not a fan of children. Lilac weighs around 50 lbs.

title: Gus
description:
Male | Mixed Breed | ~10 years
No cats
Gus was brought to us as a stray on 4/24/26. No one came for this sweet old man. He doesn’t appear to like cats but seems fine with his neighboring dogs. He’s very sweet and well-mannered. He does like to bark since everyone else seems to have something to say…we get it! We aren’t sure of his age - his face says 10 but his teeth are in great shape so he may be a year or two younger than we think. Gus weighs 74.5 lbs.

title: Cutlass
description:
Male | Heeler Doberman Mix | Born 3.8.23
No cats, no male dogs, older kids
Cutlass came to us on 4/30/26 after his owner passed away. He does not like cats or male dogs. He doesn’t seem to mind female dogs. We think he would do better with older kids, rather than younger children. We invite you to come visit him and see if you could be his next human! Cutlass is 49 lbs.

title: Gertie Mae
description:
Female | Akbash | ~3 years
Meet Gertie Mae! She joined us on 5.2.26 and has adjusted well already! She’s a big lap dog and her only flaw is food aggression. She’s a lover so as long as animals and humans leave her be while eating, she will be just fine! She does like to bark and alert her family of anything out of the ordinary but hey, she’s a dog protecting her people. She has lived with other dogs, cats, and kids. Gertie weighs between 75-80lbs.

title: Apollo
description:
Male | Black Lab/Husky Mix | 1.5 years
Apollo came to us on 5.2.26. He is taking some time to adjust and as we get to know him, we will post more updates. He is sweet, just a little timid and you can tell he’s excited to play with his toys but he needs help from a human! He has lived with dogs, cats, and children and so we hope we see positive interactions while he is with us. We do know that he is scared of thunderstorms and fireworks. Apollo weighs 76 lbs.

title: Maverick
description:
Male | Husky/Mix | <2 years old 
Maverick came to us on 4.28.26 as a stray that was never picked up. We do know his former family was trying to rehome him. Maybe he escaped… but in the end they didn’t come looking for him. He is high-energy but very sweet. He does want to play rough but he’s a youngster still so we think a home with a yard and someone(s) to play with would be great for him to burn off energy. We aren’t sure how he does with other dogs but welcome a meet-and-greet! Maverick weighs 49 lbs.

title: Guster
description:
Male | Shepherd Mix | Born 2025
No cats, some dogs
Guster (formally Junior) is back with us after not fitting in with his family. They gave it a go but he did not get along with the family cat and did not care for one of the family members smelling like her own dog… and unfortunately it did end with a bite. He does very well with younger kids and would do best as the only pet but we can facilitate a meet-and-greet with another dog to see if they get along. Guster weighs 40 lbs.
